{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Cloud Hammer sect
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Cloud Hammer sect]] is a group that includes Truegolds.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
